items.title: Thats a Horrible Idea What Time T-Shirt Funny Sarcastic Drinking Humor Men's Women's Tee T Shirt
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: thats, horrible, idea, what, time, sarcastic, drinking, humor. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.

items.title: Marvel Spider-Man Vintage Paris Premiere Fan Event T-Shirt
items.idea_prompt: Create an original, text-forward T-shirt design around: marvel, spider, man, paris, premiere, fan, event. Use clear fonts and simple iconography. Avoid trademarks.
